description_long: This house features a complex, multi-faceted roof structure with several intersecting gables, giving it a dynamic and modern architectural appearance. The exterior walls are a mix of light tan and white, with large window openings and cutaways that suggest an open-plan interior and ample natural light. The house is built on a raised foundation, with a visible section of terrain and steps leading up to the main living area. The interior layout is partially exposed, revealing multiple rooms and open spaces, as well as a split-level design. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some large picture windows and others smaller and more regularly spaced. The overall design is contemporary, with clean lines, geometric forms, and a focus on blending indoor and outdoor spaces.
description: A modern house with a complex gabled roof, asymmetrical window placement, and a raised foundation, featuring open-plan interiors and large window cutaways.
description_view_0: This view shows the house's open interior layout, intersecting gabled roofs, and a prominent raised foundation with steps and terrain detail.
description_view_1: From this side, the layered rooflines and horizontal window bands are visible, emphasizing the house's geometric and modern design.
description_view_2: This view highlights the split-level structure, large open window cutouts, and the integration of the house with the sloped terrain.
description_view_3: The rear or secondary side view reveals the staggered roof sections and the depth of the house, with multiple window openings and a clean, angular profile.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features steps leading to a recessed door, with a minimal overhang and no porch, emphasizing clean lines and openness.
